title: elymus drobovii
intro: Elymus drobovii, also known as Drobov's wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Elymus drobovii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Elymus drobovii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used as a raw material for making dietary supplements and other medicinal products.
